channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: OpenAI Just Launched a Consulting Arm to Help Companies Deploy AI
item.description: The OpenAI Deployment Company launches with $4 billion, 19 investors, and a Palantir-style playbook to embed engineers inside enterprises.

item.title: Tom Lee’s BitMine Slows Ethereum Buying Pace, Adding $62 Million in ETH
item.description: Ethereum treasury firm BitMine Immersion Technologies slowed its ETH purchase pace, adding just $62 million worth last week.

item.title: Bank of England Chief Flags ‘Coming Wrestle' With US on Stablecoin Oversight
item.description: The BoE Governor warned U.S. dollar tokens could flood Britain in a crisis, given the gap in redemption guarantees under the GENIUS Act.

item.title: Banking groups escalate fight over stablecoin yield ahead of Senate vote
item.description: The American Bankers Association amplified warnings the Senate’s Clarity Act could push deposit flight into stablecoins unless lawmakers tighten yield limits.

item.title: Corpay taps BVNK to bring stablecoin wallets to corporate payments
item.description: Corpay will use stablecoin rails in its treasury operations to improve capital efficiency, reduce reliance on pre-funded accounts, and move funds across its global footprint.

item.title: Crypto and AI could be dirty words on 2026 midterm campaign trail
item.description: Voter attitudes toward the AI and crypto industries aren’t favorable in the US, and a spotlight on how much they’re spending could further alienate them ahead of the 2026 midterms.

item.title: The biggest consensus overhaul in Solana history is officially live for testing
item.description: The upgrade, known as Alpenglow, is live on a community test cluster, said Solana core developer Anza.

item.title: Augustus gets conditional OCC approval for AI and stablecoin bank
item.description: Peter Thiel-backed Augustus has won conditional OCC approval for a US bank charter focused on AI-driven payments and stablecoin settlement infrastructure.

item.title: Ripple Lands $200 Million Financing Facility to Expand Institutional Crypto Brokerage
item.description: The XRP-linked Ripple secures financing from Neuberger Specialty Finance to fuel growth of its prime brokerage platform.

item.title: Strategy resumes Bitcoin acquisitions with $43M BTC buy
item.description: Strategy added $43 million in Bitcoin last week after Michael Saylor drew mixed investor reactions for signaling potential BTC sales to fund dividend payments.

item.title: Ripple raises $200 million from Neuberger Berman to expand its Ripple Prime platform
item.description: Ripple announced its agreement with the global investment firm Monday, noting that Ripple Prime’s revenue has tripled in the last year, when. it acquired it for $1.25 billion.

item.title: DAPPOS launches xBubble: An AI agent that learns and uses AI for you
item.description: xBubble allows users to complete specific tasks with simpler prompts by automatically building and dispatching task-specific AI agents.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: MoonPay Acquires Dawn Labs, Launches AI Trading Copilot for Prediction Markets
item.description: MoonPay’s new Dawn CLI AI trading product lets users turn plain-English prompts into automated crypto trading strategies.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: SUI surges 25% over weekend
item.description: Cronos (CRO), up 9.7% from Friday, joined Sui (SUI) as a top performer.

item.title: Strategy Resumes Bitcoin Buys as Saylor Shifts Focus to 'Never Be a Net Seller'
item.description: The treasury firm resumed Bitcoin buys after last week's pause, with Michael Saylor saying that Strategy would buy 30 BTC for every one sold.

item.title: USDC issuer Circle raises $222M in Arc token presale valued at $3B
item.description: Circle raised $222 million in an ARC token presale led by a16z Crypto as Q1 revenue hit $694 million and USDC circulation climbed to $77 billion.

item.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine slows down ether purchases after already buying 1 million tokens this year
item.description: The firm bought roughly 26,000 ether last week, a sharp decline from the average of the previous weeks' 100,000.

item.title: XRP metrics line up bull signals for ‘full-scale rally’ to $2
item.description: XRP is giving hints that a price breakout may be underway, based on several technical and onchain indicators, with bulls eyeing $2 as the first stop.

item.title: Morning Minute: The Clarity Act Markup Comes May 14
item.description: The Clarity Act finally has a real markup date, while BlackRock is making its biggest tokenization push yet.

item.title: Circle Raises $222M in Arc Token Presale at $3B Valuation
item.description: The USDC issuer announced the raise, with investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Blackrock, alongside its Q1 results.

item.title: Strategy buys 535 bitcoin for $43 million days after signaling potential BTC sales
item.description: Last week's purchases were funded by sales of the company's common stock.

item.title: Ronin set to transition to Ethereum layer 2 from independent sidechain
item.description: The purpose behind the migration is to enhance security, tokenomics and scalability, said Ronin, which suffered the largest DeFi bridge exploit on record in 2022.

item.title: Strategy has acquired 535 BTC for ~$43.0 million at ~$80,340 per bitcoin and has achieved BTC Yield of 9.4% YTD 2026. As of 5/10/2026, we hodl 818,869 $BTC acquired for ~$61.86 billion at ~$75,540 per bitcoin. $MSTR $STRC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5HWmhBU0w5RVBSWElsMHR2N3h4LVg4TjVNamVvblpOU25YUDc4Z1J3azlTTWRXdDVkb2llMHh3eDN0ak0zR0tTMmpRRWNISDhHaUpmMkhpY00tTTA?oc=5" target="_blank">Strategy has acquired 535 BTC for ~$43.0 mi…

item.title: 🚨 MASSIVE CRASH IN INDIAN MARKET. ₹7.34 trillion has been wiped out from the Indian stock market in the last 3 trading days as the oil crisis gets worse. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9Kd3NTcU12V2JTVXVYb0JBNzFYSHVGdjFubE42Z0k5WjhOZlpRVDdFSjh6ZWdsNWNmTVlQQlhVWk92aU1tZExjLTlPSkJ2RGNYVnlaU1d4S1Npbm9LTnh3?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 MASSIVE CRASH IN INDIAN MARKET. ₹7.…

item.title: Crypto funds log $858M in sixth straight week of inflows: CoinShares
item.description: Crypto ETPs drew $858 million in inflows last week, led by Bitcoin with $706 million, as sentiment improved and short-BTC funds saw $14 million of outflows.

item.title: Crypto Funds Add $858M as Clarity Act Drives Market Optimism
item.description: Digital asset inflows peak at a six-week high as a Senate stablecoin deal stokes institutional appetite across Bitcoin and altcoins.

item.title: OpenAI Faces Federal Lawsuit Over ChatGPT's Alleged Role in FSU Mass Shooting
item.description: The lawsuit alleges ChatGPT provided firearms guidance and tactical advice to the shooter, raising questions about liability for AI firms.

item.title: Bitcoin funds capture $700 million as institutions place their bets
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 11, 2026

item.title: BTC price target becomes $85K next: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin faced a choice between consolidation and new local highs as $80,000 support held despite flash BTC price volatility and liquidity grabs.

item.title: Michael Saylor’s latest tax strategy echoes Strategy’s 2022 bitcoin sale
item.description: Michael Saylor confirmed the company was prepared to sell bitcoin, reviving a tax loss harvesting strategy first used in 2022.

item.title: Trump fans put millions of dollars into a gold phone and a memecoin. Neither has gone well
item.description: Nearly 600,000 deposits worth $60 million have been collected for a gold T1 phone that has not been delivered to a single confirmed buyer, with terms quietly rewritten in April to remove delivery guarantees.

item.title: Circle raises $222 million for Arc, beats Q1 earnings estimates but misses on revenue
item.description: Circle raised $222 million for its Arc blockchain token at a $3 billion valuation, drawing backing from BlackRock, Apollo and Bullish.

item.title: Bitcoin whipsaws on CME open as Iran tensions pressure crypto markets
item.description: BTC briefly topped $82,400 before slipping below $81,000 as traders repositioned around CME futures open and geopolitical risks rattled markets.

item.title: Canton Network’s Digital Asset targets $2 billion valuation in a16z crypto-led raise: Bloomberg
item.description: Sources familiar with the matter told Bloomberg the fundraiser is expected to close in the coming weeks and the final amount might vary.

item.title: MARA expected to post Q1 losses as investors look ahead to AI growth strategy
item.description: Investors look beyond bitcoin volatility towards long term AI infrastructure and data center revenue opportunities.

item.title: Capital B raises $17.8M to expand its Bitcoin treasury
item.description: Capital B raised $17.8 million from investors, including Adam Back and TOBAM, saying proceeds could help add 182 BTC to its treasury.

item.title: Crypto.com receives UAE license for Dubai government crypto payments
item.description: Crypto.com says a new UAE Stored Value Facilities license will let residents pay Dubai government fees in crypto, as the company doubles down on regulated expansion in the Middle East and beyond.

item.title: This Bitcoin price level will be 'end of the bears' if broken, says analyst
item.description: Bitcoin’s rejection at the 200-day EMA mirrors past 25% and 36% BTC sell-offs, fueling fears of another drop toward $60,000.

item.title: Bitcoin, Nasdaq investors are celebrating, while U.S. consumers turn gloomy
item.description: Bitcoin and Nasdaq have rallied sharply, but U.S. consumer sentiment has fallen to historic lows, highlighting a widening Wall Street–Main Street divide.

item.title: New Fed chair, Base's Azul upgrade, corporate earnings: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting May 11.

item.title: 7 Democrats seen as ‘key’ to advancing CLARITY Act: Galaxy
item.description: The CLARITY Act, introduced in July 2025, stalled in January after Coinbase withdrew its support for the legislation over concerns about legal protections and stablecoin yields.

item.title: Veteran investor bets on Ethereum as AI agents drive tokenization demand
item.description: AI agents need “food,” and that food is not physical food; it is tokens, said Jordi Visser.

item.title: Australia plans capital gains tax changes affecting crypto investors: Report
item.description: The Albanese government’s budget plans to replace the 50% capital gains tax discount on assets held over 12 months with a model taxing full real gains adjusted for inflation.

item.title: White hat returns $190K to Renegade hours after hacking the protocol
item.description: The white hat hacker said the decision to exploit Renegade’s dark pool was made to protect the funds and safety of DeFi users.

item.title: The key message from ETF flows last week: this was not a full risk-on week, but a week of layered capital allocation as macro conditions improved. $BTC ETFs recorded $623M in net inflows for the week, marking 6 straight weeks of inflows. That tells us instituti - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBkcUgzcWp3THRIQkVXZmZaN094bm9JdkJGZUw5djBWTkh6SER3VEpnOHcyemktOVBaRmc2VWM3NWFyc1VSZV9oaElySl9UM3VobXlKeWRtVGNoTFB5NlFRa1o1MGZjUDg?oc=5" target="_blank">The key message from ETF fl…

item.title: Bank of England chief says global stablecoin rules will ‘wrestle’ with US
item.description: Global regulators will have to confront US policy on dollar-backed stablecoins as they seek international standards for payment tokens, Andrew Bailey said.

item.title: Bitcoin mining pools with 75% of BTC hashrate join open standard for block construction
item.description: Foundry, AntPool, F2Pool, SpiderPool, and MARA Pool are among seven pools joining the Stratum V2 working group, putting nearly three-quarters of global bitcoin hashrate behind a protocol that returns block construction decisions to individ…

item.title: SUI spikes 50% amid staking moves, zero-fee stablecoins, privacy push
item.description: Adeniyi Abiodun, co-founder of Mysten Labs, announced at an event in Miami plans for zero-fee stablecoin transfers on Sui and reiterated the ambition to add private transactions.

item.title: Privacy advocates slam reCAPTCHA update they say locks out de-Googled phones
item.description: Privacy-conscious internet users are being “demoted” from second to third-class netizens, said Bitcoiner Jameson Lopp.

item.title: XRP spikes 2.5%, beating bitcoin and ether, in breakout above $1.45
item.description: Sharp move through resistance came with one of the biggest volume spikes in weeks, though profit-taking quickly emerged near session highs.

item.title: A bitcoin whale that went silent in 2013 moves $40 million in BTC
item.description: A long-dormant whale woke up Sunday, moving millions worth of bitcoin on-chain.

item.title: Bitcoin rallies 2.3% after Trump calls Iran peace proposal ‘totally unacceptable’
item.description: 10x Research CEO Markus Thielen said Bitcoin’s strength above $80,000 could be supported by two favorable decisions in the US Senate this week.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin just dumped $1,900 in 4 hours, fully retracing the entire pump. In the last 12 hours, Bitcoin dumped $1200 from $81.2k to $80.3k Then pumped $2100 from $80.3k to $82.4k Now again down $1900 from $82.4k to $80.5k Liquidated $370M - x.com

item.title: Crypto Firms Race to 'Quantum-Proof' Wallets Before Bitcoin, Ethereum Networks Catch Up
item.description: Crypto companies are upgrading wallets to counter the coming quantum computing threat, but gaps remain.

item.title: I’m sometimes asked why a Bitcoin Treasury Company should also operate a software business. The two create powerful and unique synergies. I plan to provide more regular updates on Strategy Software, and will start here with a foundational overview. Q1 2 - x.com

item.title: AI Models Scheme, Betray and Vote Each Other Out in Survivor-Style Game
item.description: Researchers say multiplayer games may reveal AI behavior that static tests miss.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints Strategy is “back to work” buying more bitcoin 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9lNkxUMU1SSk1vUmN3N2NNMUFMYTZvS0swSzVuWFBXNlZzam1LVkxaR3pvUXp0amVCVHFmcDJlSWxWYm9Ua2VoOVBETWlFR3BHZEp5MUJhT2FwTVBNWTcwc0xtbVl1U2s?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hin…

item.title: 🚨Banks are trying to kill the most important crypto bill in US history again. And the Senate vote is just 4 days away. On May 1 a bipartisan compromise was reached on stablecoin yield after months of negotiations. The Senate Banking Committee immediately s - x.com

item.title: CME Targets June 1 Launch for Bitcoin Volatility Futures, Pending CFTC Review CME Group plans to launch Bitcoin Volatility Futures（BVI）on June 1, 2026, pending CFTC review. The contract size will be $500 multiplied by the CME CF Bitcoin Volatility Index, - x.com
